title: Bureau runtime and repo orchestration rebuild
goal: Rebuild Bureau's runtime and repository orchestration spine with read-only drift truth, hard approval paths, explicit lifecycle repair, repo registry, and bounded task planning before fetch or pull automation.
completion: Bureau has a deterministic read-only runtime drift check before runtime repair.
Steuerboard execution cannot silently operate against a drifted Bureau checkout.
Lifecycle, approval, repo registry, safe fetch/import, what-now, and Steuerboard artifact planning work is represented by explicit tasks.

operator_lab_trigger_check.reason: planning and registry cut only; no runtime-performance or agent-capability claim
